name: Madoro Metals Corp.
summary: Madoro Metals Corp., a precious metals company, engages in the exploration and development of gold-silver projects in Mexico. The company holds options to acquire 100% interests in Yautepec gold and silver project covering 12,260 hectares; Magdalena gold and silver project covering 480 hectares; and Rama de Oro gold and silver project covering 1,940 hectares near Oaxaca city, Mexico. The company was formerly known as Megastar Development Corp. and changed its name to Madoro Metals Corp. in March 2021. Madoro Metals Corp. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
